hero.description: Build real ERP confidence with guided courses, live workshops, hands-on labs, and role-based training for business users, consultants, and developers.

liveClass.label: Live class
liveClass.title: ERP Foundations
liveClass.quote: The training helped our team understand the full workflow, not just individual screens.
liveClass.author: Ariyan Rahman

pathsSection.title: Choose the path that fits your role
pathsSection.description: Every course path is designed around practical implementation work, so learners can apply the concepts immediately in real business scenarios.

learningPaths.title: Functional Consultant
learningPaths.description: Master business workflows, app configuration, implementation planning, and client-facing ERP delivery.

learningPaths.title: Developer Bootcamp
learningPaths.description: Build modules, customize workflows, connect APIs, and prepare production-ready AdonERP extensions.

learningPaths.title: Business User Training
learningPaths.description: Train daily users to manage customers, quotations, invoices, tasks, reports, and approvals confidently.

formatsSection.description: Learn live, on-site, or at your own pace. Mix formats to build a training plan that works for your team and implementation stage.

formats.title: Live Online Classes
formats.description: Join instructor-led sessions with real-time Q&A, demos, and guided exercises.

formats.title: On-site Team Training
formats.description: Bring AdonERP experts to your organization for role-based hands-on workshops.

formats.title: Self-paced Academy
formats.description: Learn anytime through structured videos, checkpoints, quizzes, and downloadable resources.

formats.title: Certification Prep
formats.description: Practice implementation cases and prepare for consultant or developer certification.

scheduleSection.title: Join the next live training
scheduleSection.description: Reserve a seat for upcoming classes and workshops. Each session includes downloadable resources, recordings, and exercises.

ctaSection.description: Give your users, consultants, and developers a clear learning path so adoption becomes faster, cleaner, and easier to scale.
